review: I have to give them credit because they have the best deals of any fast food app. By far. I'm going to choose where I eat fast food based on how little money I can spend so, they get a lot of my money. The app really sucks though, it takes about 25 seconds just to open and there's a huge leg when you tap on anything. It's really strange like the app is from the 90s, meanwhile they have billions of dollars. Hopefully soon they can design an app that reflects that.

Trash app and trash service. The last time I ordered on the app around four AM and went to my local McD, the guy at the restaurant threw a fit, saying they need one to two hours to change menus and that they can't accommodate me; I've already paid. So today, I'll wait until after 4, when the menus are actually changed. Order, payment is processed, guy at the restaurant tells me they never got my order, but money still left my account, and now I once again lost a mcd points rewards (cost 4000)
luv the burgers n the breakfast

Terrible. Scamy. Will try to steal your money. No cancel option for pick-up. Was meant to be delivery. App changed it to pick up and to a bad location in a mall downtown. No support from the store. No support via phone. Can't use the app in the mean time to order an actual delivery. Had to go out and order from a location near my house. Paid double and got half the food. Not worth the hassle.
